So that business consultant that I mentioned, I spent tens of thousands of dollars on over the course of a year. I want to give you a great piece of tangible advice that he had given me in order to execute at a higher level than I was when I was having some delivery and operations issues. He told me, Jeremy, your speed to result dictates your ability to stay in business. Your speed to result is what's going to give you the ability to over deliver and what's going to get you to take on more clients and handle more. You need to be more productive. You need to have more efficiencies. Your speed to result and your ability to seek out any efficiencies that you can and any productivity hacks that get you more speed to get results is going to dictate once again your ability for full raw expansion. You see, if you don't focus on these things at all times, you're going to be focusing on other things. Now focus and your attention goes, that's where your results flow. So if you have negative attention or you're worried or you're going to worry some state in business, worry some situations typically incur. If you're focused on your speed to result all the time, all you keep doing is getting faster and more consistent and gain more momentum because that's where your attention's going. This has been psychological play as well. You have to understand once again your speed is to be controlled at the same time. Here's a great quote for you. Speed is power but power is nothing without control. You see, you need to have the ability to go fast to get to here to a result but you have to do it in a way that doesn't an ethical, controlled, non. That's the word I'm looking for here. You want to do it in a way that doesn't destroy your business operations. You want to do it in a way where you have fluency, it's at ease, it's a stress free environment but you're going really fast while you're doing it. Think of those Japanese trains, those bullet trains. Just, just fly. Think of our trains comparatively. They would go that fast. They'd go rickety because if object in motion that's asymmetrical with energy or mass and attitudes momentable destroy itself. You have to understand that you have to be symmetrical, harmonious, meaning you have to be balanced and be operationally sound and you have to understand that to deliver in phase number six, the delivery phase, your ability to get speed to results matters most.
